title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Heavy Electricals

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Heavy Electricals
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
